input.title: Elegant context timeout fallback in Go
input.content:
When calling an external API, it is often useful to wrap the user's ctx with an additional timeout so an unresponsive downstream does not drag the service down.

```go
func callWithTimeout(ctx context.Context, d time.Duration) error {
    cctx, cancel := context.WithTimeout(ctx, d)
    defer cancel()
    return downstream.Do(cctx)
}
```

Notes:
1. cancel must be deferred, otherwise goroutines may leak
2. If the parent ctx is already canceled, the child ctx is canceled immediately too
3. Timeout precedence: child < parent (the stricter one wins)

No todos.
